text:
Overview

Niformation (にふぉるめーしょん) is a line of wafer snacks and sticker products from Bandai sold in stores in Japan. Many popular anime and manga series have collaborated with Niformation, with Hunter × Hunter marking its first collaboration with them on July 11, 2022. Most of the Niformation collabs revolve solely around sticker and wafer packs; however, some popular titles also have figures with the brand as well (although Hunter × Hunter is not yet one of those titles).

Niformation stickers have unique illustrations of Hunter × Hunter characters, designed using a "2-head" ratio (にとうしん（2頭身）) where the full height of the character is intended to be equal to twice the size of the head. Niformation packs typically contain one sticker from the volume and a wafer snack of that volume's specific flavour. The stickers come in a variety of rarities, depending on the volume.

All of the Niformation collabs with Hunter × Hunter to date follow the same naming convention, using the style of Hunter × Hunter titles to be called Sticker × Wafer.

Sticker × Wafer Vol.1

Sticker × Wafer Vol.1 (シール×ウエハースvol.1), abbreviated to HH1 on sticker packaging, was the first collab between Niformation and Hunter × Hunter, having released on July 11 th , 2022. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2022/4549660737568000.html This volume revolved around characters from the Hunter Exam arc and the Yorknew City arc, and featured two different designs for its packs to reflect this. Each pack retailed for 100 yen and came with one sticker and one wafer. The wafer flavour for this volume was cocoa cream.

Bandai Candy ran a promotional social media campaign from March 18, 2022, to March 27, 2022, for this volume, giving away 20 packs of the product to 5 winners. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/news/2022/0318/entry2285.html 

This volume contains 32 different stickers, divided into five rarities: Normal (11 stickers), Rare (11 stickers), Super Rare (6 stickers), Hunter Rare (2 stickers), and Double Hunter Rare (2 stickers). The Double Hunter Rare stickers are gold foiled. The full set of stickers for this volume can be found in the image gallery.

Sticker × Wafer Vol.2

Sticker × Wafer Vol.2 (シール×ウエハースvol.2), abbreviated to HH2 on sticker packaging, was the second collab between Niformation and Hunter × Hunter. The collab released on November 7 th , 2022, https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2022/4549660836100000.html and was themed around the Chimera Ant arc. The price of the packs remained the same as in the previous collaboration (100 yen), and the wafer flavor remained the same as well (cocoa cream).

This collab also received a promotional social media campaign, running from October 28, 2022 to November 3, 2022, although the timeline (now running once per day during the period) and giveaway stipulations were different from the previous (requiring interactions with specific social media posts each day). https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1585795187242323969 https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1586153340378939392 https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1586515727879651328 https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1586878117469036544 https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1587240505078738944 https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1587602892067700736 https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1587965280629784576 https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1588335367861993475 The prize details were the same (a 20-pack box from this volume), but a winner was chosen every day for the first seven days, and five winners would win on the eighth day. The box could also be pre-ordered from Premium Bandai until December 16, 2023. 

This volume contains 30 different stickers, divided into the same five rarities as the previous collab: Normal (9 stickers), Rare (9 stickers), Super Rare (6 stickers), Hunter Rare (4 stickers), and Double Hunter Rare (2 stickers). However, a notable difference from the previous collab was that the Double Hunter Rare stickers now glowed in the dark. https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1549562242441523200 The full set of stickers for this volume can be found in the image gallery.

Sticker × Wafer Vol.3

Sticker × Wafer Vol.3 (シール×ウエハースvol.3) was the third collab between Niformation and Hunter × Hunter. The collab released on March 6 th , 2023, https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2023/4549660957874000.html and was themed around the Greed Island arc. The price of the packs remained the same as the two previous volumes (100 yen), as did the wafer flavour (cocoa cream). A 20-pack of the product was able to be pre-ordered on Premium Bandai until December 16 th , 2023.

This volume contains 28 different stickers, divided into six rarities, with five rarities carrying over from the previous collab, with an additional Secret rarity: Normal (9 stickers), Rare (8 stickers), Super Rare (6 stickers), Hunter Rare (2 stickers), Double Hunter Rare (1 sticker), Secret (2 stickers). Unlike the previous collaboration, the Double Hunter Rare sticker is not glow-in-the-dark; instead, it is double-foiled. The full set of stickers for this volume can be found in the image gallery.

This volume had a much larger promotional giveaway campaign, which received its own dedicated webpage on Bandai's website, themed around Greed Island. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/stickercollection/camp/hunter/ Unlike the previous campaigns, which required social media interaction, this giveaway was built into the product itself. Those who purchased packs would be able to win a sticker collection binder themed after the Greed Island book if the backing of the sticker they received was gold. The sticker binder could hold up to 120 stickers. This campaign ran from the volume's release until May 31 st , 2023.

Sticker × Wafer Vol.4

Sticker × Wafer Vol.4 (シール×ウエハースvol.4), abbreviated to HH4 on sticker packaging, was the fourth collab between Niformation and Hunter × Hunter. It released on August 14 th , 2023, and focused on characters from the Zoldyck Family (including characters from both the Zoldyck Family arc and the 13th Hunter Chairman Election arc), as well as characters from the Yorknew City arc, including additional Yorknew City characters who did not appear previously in Sticker × Wafer Vol.1. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2023/4570117910104000.html The two different pack designs represented this, although they, like previous collabs, did not vary in sticker content from each other. Each pack retailed for 120 yen, making them the most expensive of the collabs up to the time of their release. The wafer flavour for this volume remained the same as the previous collabs (cocoa cream).

Bandai Candy ran a promotional social media campaign from August 9, 2023 until August 20, 2023 to give away one box (20 packs) of the product to 5 winners. https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1689184913244000256 This 20 pack box was also available for pre-order from Premium Bandai until December 16, 2023.

This volume contains 30 stickers, split into six rarities. Unlike previous collabs, the Double Hunter Rare rarity does not exist in this volume, and was instead replaced by the Zoldyck Rare rarity, which was a special rarity only for this volume. The breakdown for the volume is as follows: Normal (5 stickers), Rare (11 stickers), Super Rare (8 stickers), Hunter Rare (4 stickers), Zoldyck Rare (1 sticker), and Secret (1 sticker). The Hunter Rare stickers in this volume are foiled and holo. The full set of stickers for this volume can be found in the image gallery.

Sticker × Wafer Vol.5

Sticker × Wafer Vol.5 (シール×ウエハースvol.5) was the fifth collab between Niformation and Hunter × Hunter, and released on February 26 th , 2024. It primarily included characters from the Heavens Arena arc, as well as some characters and moments from the Hunter Exam arc that were not in Sticker × Wafer Vol.1, and had a different pack design for each of the two arcs. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2024/4570117913082000.html The packs retained the same price (120 yen) and wafer flavour (cocoa cream) as the previous collab. A 20-pack of the product could be pre-ordered from Premium Bandai until December 16 th , 2024.

The promotional giveaway for this volume allowed five winners to win a 20-pack box of the product, and ran until March 3, 2024. https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1760500842178941139 

This volume contains 32 stickers, and had the most rarities up to this point with a total of seven. The Double Hunter Rare rarity returned in this volume, and a brand new rarity was added called Luminous Rare (or Glow in the Dark Rare), which produced the same glow-in-the-dark effect as the Double Hunter Rare stickers from Sticker × Wafer Vol.2. With the glow-in-the-dark effect having its own rarity for this volume, the Double Hunter Rare stickers instead are foiled, holo, and embossed here. The breakdown for the rarities in this volume is as follows: Normal (12 stickers), Rare (7 stickers), Super Rare (4 stickers), Luminous Rare (4 Stickers), Hunter Rare (3 stickers), Double Hunter Rare (1 sticker), and Secret (1 sticker). The full set of stickers for this volume can be found in the image gallery.

Sticker × Wafer Vol.6

Sticker × Wafer Vol.6 (シール×ウエハースvol.6), abbreviated to HH6 on sticker packaging, was the sixth collab between Niformation and Hunter × Hunter, and released on June 10 th , 2024. https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1796451722979868988 It focused primarily on members of the Phantom Troupe, in addition to some other characters from the Yorknew City arc that were not previously included in Sticker × Wafer Vol.1 or Sticker × Wafer Vol.4. The packs were priced slightly higher than before at 130 yen, and this would be the first volume since the collab's release to change the flavour of the wafer snack, which was now caramel cream. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2024/4570117915796000.html 

The promotional giveaway for this volume ran until June 16, 2024, and five winners would win a 20-pack box of the product. https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1798550568736366910 It was also one of the few volumes to receive a promotional video on Bandai's official YouTube channel showing off the product prior to its release. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=u18gFDcOT_s A 20-pack box of the product could be pre-ordered from Premium Bandai until December 16 th , 2024.

This volume contains 34 stickers, making it the largest volume since the collab's release. It also had the largest amount of changes to the previous rarity types in the collab's history, as well as the largest number of rarities in general, with eight rarities in total, comprised of four brand new rarities in addition to four previously seen rarities. All of the Phantom Troupe-based rarities are exclusive to this volume. The breakdown for the rarities in this volume is as follows: Normal (6 stickers), Troupe Rare (13 stickers), Super Rare (4 stickers), Nen Rare (4 Stickers), Hunter Rare (4 stickers), Phantom Rare (1 sticker), Secret (1 sticker), and Parallel Secret Rare (1 sticker). The full set of stickers for this volume can be found in the image gallery.

Sticker × Wafer Vol.7

Sticker × Wafer Vol.7 (シール×ウエハースvol.7) was the seventh collab between Niformation and Hunter × Hunter, and released on May 19 th , 2025. It was the first volume to not focus on any particular arcs, but instead included characters from every arc in the 2011 anime up to the time of the volume's release, focusing on their Nen abilities. The packs retained the same price (130 yen) and wafer flavour (caramel cream) as the previous collab. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2025/4570117919121000.html 

This volume had the same standard social media giveaway as many previous volumes, where people could participate in the giveaway through May 16, 2025 until May 25, 2025, and five winners would win a 20-pack box of the product. https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1923196970220519661 

This volume contains 32 stickers and 6 rarity types. The Nen Rare rarity returned here from the previous volume, and was expanded on further into three separate Nen-based rarities. The breakdown for the rarities in this volume is as follows: Normal (10 stickers), Super Rare (4 stickers), Nen Normal (6 stickers), Nen Rare (6 Stickers), Nen Extreme Rare (5 stickers), and Secret (1 sticker). The full set of stickers for this volume can be found in the image gallery.

Sticker × Wafer Vol.8

Sticker × Wafer Vol.8 (シール×ウエハースvol.8) will be the eighth collab between Niformation and Hunter × Hunter, and is planned to release in October of 2025. https://x.com/candytoy_c/status/1935882827574526352 It will focus primarily on characters from the 13th Hunter Chairman Election arc, namely members of the Zodiacs and Zoldyck Family. The price point is slightly higher than the previous volume, at 135 yen per pack, and the wafer flavour for this volume is set to be strawberry cream. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2025/4570117927058000.html A 20-pack box of this volume is currently available for pre-order on Premium Bandai. https://p-bandai.jp/item/item-1000231313/ 

The full rarity breakdown of this volume has not officially been released yet, however there will be 35 stickers in total (33 other rarities and 2 Secret), the most amount of stickers in any of the volumes. There will be at least one sticker for each of the Zodiacs.

Trivia

 
Niformation HUNTERxHUNTER Vol 6 - Parallel Secret Rare Kurapika & Chrollo.png|Parallel Secret Rare Version
Niformation HUNTERxHUNTER Vol 6 - Super Rare Kurapika & Chrollo.png|Super Rare Version
 

In Sticker × Wafer Vol.6, the Parallel Secret Rare rarity is not listed on the rarity breakdown on Bandai's site, and the sticker of this rarity is not shown in any of the promotional materials for the volume, nor is it listed on the back of the standard packaging for the packs like all of the other stickers. Despite not being listed on the packs in any way, the sticker can be pulled from standard packs. The sticker is a companion to one of the Super Rare stickers from the same volume, and the packaging for it marks it as having the same item number (27) as its Super Rare companion sticker, but listed with a different rarity (PSR).
